title: Secure Login System
description: A full-stack authentication system focusing on SQL injection prevention and secure database management. I utilized MariaDB for storage and Flask for the backend logic. Made for a public demonstration that deepened class understanding of secure data management.

title: Dijkstra Implementation in C++
description: A C++ project that works with Graphs. It builds a graph off of an input file, then builds a summary table using Dijkstras Algorithm. Finally, it detects all cycles in a directed graph using a custom Depth First Search algorithm.

title: Zip and Unzip in C++
description: A C++ project that compresses and uncompresses text documents. It uses Huffman Encoding to build an output file, and a map to rebuild the uncompressed file.

title: Shadow Killer Game
description: 2nd Place winner of Mercer's Game Development Club's first 2026 gamejam. It features a custom 2D lighting engine developed in Godot.
codeSnippet:
#A small look at the code behind the lighting engine seen in game.
  #Calculate the shadow stretch (To the side of the box)
	for light in allLights:
		#Get the distance from the light 
		var lightPos = light.global_position
		
		var localCenter = Vector2.ZERO
		for point in basePolygon:
			localCenter += point
		localCenter /= basePolygon.size()
		var globalCenter = to_global(localCenter)
		
		var lightRadius = light.lightRadius
		var direction = lightPos.direction_to(globalCenter)
		var distance = globalCenter.distance_to(lightPos)
				
		#Only cast the shadow if within light's radius
		if distance > lightRadius:
			continue

		#Calculate opacity
		var distRatio = distance/lightRadius
		var alpha = 1.0 - distRatio
		alpha = clamp(alpha, 0.0, 1.0)
		
		#Calculate how far and fast the shadow should stretch
		var stretchSpeed  = 0.45
		var stretchLength = (distance*4) * stretchSpeed
